alert.title: DeadLetterQueue growing: events-consumer
alert.body: events-consumer dead-letter queue growing fast; downstream analytics counts flat

signals.title: events-consumer error
signals.body: failed to deserialize message: unknown field 'user_tier', schema validation error, unmarshal failed

signals.title: Deploy checkout-producer v6.3
signals.body: producer began emitting new 'user_tier' field in event payload; consumer schema not updated

signals.title: consumer throughput
signals.body: consumer throughput dropped to near zero as messages routed to DLQ

signals.title: broker health
signals.body: kafka broker healthy, partitions balanced (not a broker issue)

ground_truth.root_cause: Producer added a new 'user_tier' field; consumer schema drift caused deserialization failures and dropped events
acceptable_next_steps: Update the consumer schema to accept 'user_tier'
